name: InsightsOperationContracts
description: Versioned request, result, authority, idempotency, limit, policy, compatibility, stable-error, and process-envelope contracts for all public INSIGHTS capabilities.
schema_def: Shared envelope: operationId, contractVersion, schemaFingerprint, correlationRef, resultKind, compatibility, limits, stable exitCategory.
Discover: system.schema.list/show filtered to INSIGHTS returns eleven descriptors plus policy catalogue metadata.
insights.report.generate input {budgetPeriod, revisionId?, windows[], metricKinds[], signalKinds[], includeCategoryBreakdown, policySelectors?}; read-only; result InsightReport.
insights.report.explain input {snapshotId, selector?}; read-only; result stored ExplanationAndProvenance, NotFound, or Deleted.
insights.report.get input {snapshotId}; read-only; result ReportSnapshot, NotFound, or Deleted.
insights.report.list input {budgetPeriod?, createdFrom?, createdTo?, actor?, limit}; read-only; result metadata-only ordered items or ResourceLimit.
insights.report.retain input {analysisRequest, actor, reason}; mutating; idempotency required; result ReportSnapshot.
insights.report.restate input {predecessorSnapshotId, policySelectors?, actor, reason}; mutating; idempotency required; result ReportSnapshot plus RestatementDifference or NoChange.
insights.report.delete input {snapshotId, actor, reason}; mutating; idempotency required; result DeletionEvent or DependencyConflict.
insights.status.get input {}; read-only; result metadata-only StoreStatus.
insights.backup.create input {target, actor, reason?}; mutating; idempotency required; result BackupReceipt.
insights.restore.activate input {source, expectedCurrentFingerprint, actor, reason?}; mutating; idempotency required; result RestoreReceipt.
Unknown fields, financial process arguments, unsupported policy versions, upstream mutation authority, and partial output are forbidden.
